name: Michael Racioppo
formerRole: Vice President, Finance at Henry Schein, Inc
connectionToCompany: Held a VP Finance role at Henry Schein reporting into the CFO organization under Steven Paladino before transitioning to senior finance leadership elsewhere
sourceNote: Known Henry Schein finance executive; CFO organization alumni
verificationNote: Gemini confirmed this person and their role at Acrisure. Acrisure is a private company so the CFO role does not trigger the public company C-suite removal rule. Retained as-is.
